class.name: MultiMeshRenderer2D
class.brief_description: A 2D node that renders ECS entities as instances in a MultiMesh.
class.description: [b]MultiMeshRenderer2D[/b] is a 2D node that efficiently renders multiple ECS entities as instances within a single MultiMesh. It maps one or more Flecs prefabs to multimesh instances, updating their transforms each frame for optimal 2D rendering performance.

method.name: get_draw_order
method.description: Returns the draw ordering mode for multimesh instances.

method.name: get_prefabs_rendered
method.description: Returns the array of prefab names whose entities will be rendered by this renderer.

method.name: set_draw_order
method.description: Sets the draw ordering mode for multimesh instances.

method.name: set_prefabs_rendered
method.description: Sets the array of prefab names whose entities will be rendered by this renderer.

members.member: Controls instance sorting for rendering (None, X, or Y axis).
Prefab names whose entities are rendered by this node.
